introSection: Flying Dragon Wagon  was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at FastTrax Entertainment in Fort Myers Beach, Florida, United States. It never actually operated in this park, and instead stood SBNO for 1 to 3 years.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride originally opened in Celebration City, then called Branson USA, in 1999. It closed in 2001 due to the park being bought by the nearby Silver Dollar City. Some rides where sold after this purchase, with Flying Dragon Wagon being one of them.

The ride was bought by FastTrax Entertainment, where it was set up, but never actually opened.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and supports, when at FastTrax Entertainment, full black when at Celebration City.

fullText:
Flying Dragon Wagon  was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at FastTrax Entertainment in Fort Myers Beach, Florida, United States. It never actually operated in this park, and instead stood SBNO for 1 to 3 years.

The ride originally opened in Celebration City, then called Branson USA, in 1999. It closed in 2001 due to the park being bought by the nearby Silver Dollar City. Some rides where sold after this purchase, with Flying Dragon Wagon being one of them.

The ride was bought by FastTrax Entertainment, where it was set up, but never actually opened.



Red track and supports, when at FastTrax Entertainment, full black when at Celebration City.
